calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2026 Set For Trial On Jan-25-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declaration Of Counsel; Separate Statement; And Order (Proposed), To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admissions, Set One, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
TIMOTHY O' CONNOR, Esq., of THE O'CONNOR LAW FIRM., Tel:916.862.1672 for plaintiff.
ANNE S. CRUZ, Esq., of ARMIJO, MOROVATI & SHIELDS, Tel: (213) 612-5335 for defendant HJ SF Holdings LLC dba Hotel Julian.

Hearing held: A timely Notice of Contest was received from Plaintiff's and defendant's counsel.Plaintif Counsel contest 1. On the court's own motion, Plaintiff's late reply papers are stricken and regarding the typo error of the sanctions. Defendant's counsel contested the imposition of sanctions and objected to the Court's order compelling further responses to Plaintiff's Request for Admissions, Set One, Nos. 1, 2, 4, and 5. Defendant's counsel further argued that additional articulation was necessary regarding the measurements of the stairs, as the subject property contains multiple stairways.The Court referenced Code of Civil Procedure section 2016.040 regarding the meet-and-confer requirement in discovery matters, stating that the parties are required to make a reasonable and good faith effort to resolve discovery disputes in real time and, where appropriate, through in-person discussions.The matter argued/discussed. The Court reviewed the pleadings and heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiffs Brad Gunderson and Kadi Gunderson's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admissions, Set One, And Request For Sanctions is taken under submission and to correct the sanction amount.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***An Order compelling further responses to RFA's. signed after the hearing.***

Notice Of Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declaration Of Counsel; Separate Statement; And Order (Proposed), To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admissions, Set One, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Continued To May-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
